message:
tests: update full-system e2e + valid manifest vector for audit-surface churn

- crates/fcp-e2e/tests/full_system_e2e.rs: small adjustments to
  match the updated EnforcementContext builder surface (new
  token_id / node_attestation_id / issuer_key_id /
  binary_artifact_id fields introduced for the lane-3 revocation
  wiring commit) so the e2e harness continues to exercise the
  canonical pipeline end-to-end against the stricter contract.

- tests/vectors/manifest/manifest_valid.toml: realigns the
  canonical "valid manifest" fixture with the latest manifest
  serialization after the registry LinkedBinary / canonical CBOR
  hardening landed, so manifest-shape snapshot tests continue to
  pass against the tightened validator.

Both are tracked along with the code changes they cover to keep the
test matrix in sync with the recent security hardening commits.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
